title: Connect GitHub
description: Link your GitHub account to enable cloud sync and quest submissions.

dialogue.text: GitHub unlocks cloud sync, quest submissions, and moving your progress between devices. We'll connect with a classic personal access token (PAT).

options.text: Show me the steps
Quiz me first

dialogue.text: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic). Create a token with repo + gist scopes, copy it once, then paste it into /cloudsync and click Save.

options.text: Got it—quiz me

dialogue.text: What does connecting GitHub enable in DSPACE?

options.text: Cloud sync, quest submissions, and portability
Direct access to your private repos
It just unlocks cosmetic themes

dialogue.text: Close, but not quite. Connecting GitHub is about syncing saves and submitting quests, not repo control or cosmetics.

options.text: Try again

dialogue.text: At a high level, what do PAT scopes mean?

options.text: They are permissions; pick only what you need (repo + gist here)
They are billing tiers for GitHub accounts
They control your local browser settings

dialogue.text: Scopes are permissions on the token, not billing or browser settings. Keep them minimal.

options.text: Back to start

dialogue.text: How should you treat your PAT?

options.text: Treat it as sensitive and keep it private
Post it in a repo issue so teammates can reuse it
Store it in a public gist for convenience

dialogue.text: Tokens are sensitive. Treat them like passwords and keep them private.

options.text: Try again

dialogue.text: Where can you revoke a token if it ever leaks?

options.text: GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens
In the DSPACE /inventory page
By deleting your local save file

dialogue.text: Token control lives on GitHub, under Personal access tokens. Revoke it there and create a new one if needed.

options.text: Reset and try again

dialogue.text: Great! Your GitHub account is connected. The finish button unlocks once a valid token is saved.

options.text: All set!
